headline: Guy's 'I'm Not Like Other Guys' Is Followed By Him Ghosting, Proving He Is Exactly Like Other Guys
summary: The prophecy fulfilled itself in 3 dates. She has framed his texts as 'Exhibit A.'
fullBody: Jake Unique spent 3 dates explaining how 'different' he was. Then he ghosted. 'I'm just busy,' Jake texted 2 weeks later. His ex, Emma, has framed his 'I'm not like other guys' text. 'He was exactly like other guys,' Emma said. 'Worse, actually. Other guys didn't spend 3 hours convincing me otherwise.' Jake is now 'working on himself' — which means 'dating other people.' Emma is now 'working on her collection of framed texts.'
